package service

import (
	"context"

	"example.com/project/internal/repository"
)

type AuditService struct {
	logger *repository.NoopAuditLogger
}

func NewAuditService(logger *repository.NoopAuditLogger) *AuditService {
	return &AuditService{logger: logger}
}

func (s *AuditService) Publish(ctx context.Context, event repository.AuditEvent) error {
	return s.logger.Publish(ctx, event)
}
